title: scabiosa atropurpurea subsp. atropurpurea
intro: Scabiosa atropurpurea subsp. atropurpurea, also known as the purple pincushion flower, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. It is a member of the honeysuckle family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers are used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and have been shown to have antibacterial and antifungal properties. The herbal preparations of Scabiosa atropurpurea subsp. atropurpurea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system.
